title: Logical error: '(isConst() || isSparse() || isReplicated()) ? getDataType() == rhs.getDataType() : typeid(*this) == typeid(rhs)' (STID: 2508-35cc)
poc: CREATE TABLE test (c String) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO TABLE test SELECT randomString(10) from numbers(1000);
key_bug_features: Ordering by column size in SELECT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT number, randomString(5), rand() FROM numbers(100);
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY name, name.size FORMAT Null;
